# Huawei

Huawei is a global leader in ICT infrastructure, offering comprehensive smart
data center solutions that help organizations achieve higher efficiency,
reliability, and sustainability.

## Why Partner with Huawei

Huawei's innovative approach to data center infrastructure enables organizations
to reduce energy consumption, improve operational efficiency, and accelerate
digital transformation initiatives.
